title: ジャパンダートダービーの後に・大井魂

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
...And she crosses in first place! We have our new
dirt champiooon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One may have lost today, but she still did a
great job out on the track. When I head over to
meet her after the race...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Man, never feels good to lose, but dang!
The racers here at Oi don't hold back! Figures I
wouldn't get an easy win here!
choice_data_list:
That's what makes racing them all the more
worthwhile, huh?

That's what makes racing them all the more
worthwhile, huh?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Havin' to really work for the top'll make
gettin' there feel so much sweeter!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I mighta lost here, but that's not gonna happen at the Tokyo Daishoten! That's where I'll grab the top!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Heh, those're some pretty big words. Glad to see
you're still goin' strong.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
We'll be even stronger by the end of the year. Ya
went 'n' lit a fire in us out there, Inari.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
But no matter how high those flames climb, ya
have to show us ya can fly right over 'em!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: That's what havin' true Oi spirit's about!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
I'm lookin' forward to that comin' festival, where
you'll reach the top for real.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'll toughen up by the year's end. I've got Oi spirit
in my heart...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next battle will be the Tokyo Daishoten,
where the top of the regionals is on the line!
